message:
✨ Add unified dashboard configs (storage, network, events, workloads, operators) (#435)

Add 5 new dashboard configurations:
- Storage: PVCs, PVs, quotas
- Network: Services, Ingresses, NetworkPolicies
- Events: Event stream, timeline, warnings
- Workloads: Deployments, StatefulSets, DaemonSets, Jobs
- Operators: OLM Operators, Subscriptions, Helm

Total unified dashboards: 9

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,97 @@
+/**
+ * Events Dashboard Configuration
+ *
+ * Dashboard focused on Kubernetes events monitoring.
+ */
+
+import type { UnifiedDashboardConfig } from '../../lib/unified/types'
+
+export const eventsDashboardConfig: UnifiedDashboardConfig = {
+  id: 'events',
+  name: 'Events',
+  subtitle: 'Kubernetes events monitoring',
+  route: '/events',
+
+  statsType: 'events',
+  stats: {
+    type: 'events',
+    title: 'Event Activity',
+    collapsible: true,
+    showConfigButton: true,
+    blocks: [
+      {
+        id: 'total-events',
+        name: 'Total',
+        icon: 'Activity',
+        color: 'blue',
+        visible: true,
+        valueSource: { type: 'field', path: 'summary.totalEvents' },
+      },
+      {
+        id: 'warning-events',
+        name: 'Warnings',
+        icon: 'AlertTriangle',
+        color: 'yellow',
+        visible: true,
+        valueSource: { type: 'field', path: 'summary.warningCount' },
+      },
+      {
+        id: 'error-events',
+        name: 'Errors',
+        icon: 'AlertCircle',
+        color: 'red',
+        visible: true,
+        valueSource: { type: 'field', path: 'summary.errorCount' },
+      },
+      {
+        id: 'normal-events',
+        name: 'Normal',
+        icon: 'CheckCircle2',
+        color: 'green',
+        visible: true,
+        valueSource: { type: 'field', path: 'summary.normalCount' },
+      },
+    ],
+  },
+
+  cards: [
+    {
+      id: 'events-1',
+      cardType: 'event_stream',
+      position: { w: 6, h: 4, x: 0, y: 0 },
+    },
+    {
+      id: 'events-2',
+      cardType: 'warning_events',
+      position: { w: 6, h: 4, x: 6, y: 0 },
+    },
+    {
+      id: 'events-3',
+      cardType: 'recent_events',
+      position: { w: 6, h: 3, x: 0, y: 4 },
+    },
+    {
+      id: 'events-4',
+      cardType: 'events_timeline',
+      position: { w: 6, h: 3, x: 6, y: 4 },
+    },
+  ],
+
+  availableCardTypes: [
+    'event_stream',
+    'warning_events',
+    'recent_events',
+    'events_timeline',
+  ],
+
+  features: {
+    dragDrop: true,
+    autoRefresh: true,
+    autoRefreshInterval: 10000,
+    addCard: true,
+  },
+
+  storageKey: 'kubestellar-unified-events-dashboard',
+}
+
+export default eventsDashboardConfig

+export const storageDashboardConfig: UnifiedDashboardConfig = {

+    autoRefreshInterval: 30000,
+    addCard: true,
+  },
+
+  storageKey: 'kubestellar-unified-storage-dashboard',
+}
+
+export default storageDashboardConfig
